Title: charsets_list
Description: List known character set names and aliases.

This function produces a list of all character set names and aliases
      known to Virtuoso. The returned value is an array of string s with a character set name as each element.
      If the gen_res_set flag is 1, the function also
      produces a result set in which each row contains one varchar column with
      a name of a character set or alias.
Examples:
SQL> charsets_list(1);
CS_NAME
VARCHAR
437
819
850
855
866
874
999
CP1250
CP1251
CP1252
CP1257
CP437
....

....
x:= charsets_list (0);
y := aref (x, 0); -- will be '437'
y := aref (x, 1); -- will be '819'
....
